### NFT-Chain Pre-Launch now Live — A New Era for Digital Collectibles!

>  **Live Now: NFT-Chain Marketplace** — the future of NFT Aggregated Economy.
The next phase in Korea Chain expansion, one more **billion-dollar
opportunity** in secure, decentralized innovation.

![](https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1024/1*b-2FDHrJeCLxoo6C78oIYg.png) The
Beautiful NFT-Chain Marketplace

Big news! The moment we’ve all been waiting for has arrived — **NFT-Chain Pre-
Launch Phase is now live!** Step into the freshest revolution in digital art,
collectibles, and on-chain rewards today.

🚀 Our brand-new **Marketplace** is officially open — smoother, faster, smarter
— built to bring your favorite NFTs (and the rewards they unlock) into one
unified wonderland 🌈.

###  **Buy from any blockchain. Hold on NFT-Chain**

🌍 No more hopping chains, no more confusion — just pure, joyful collecting!
Buy from your favorite blockchain, hold on NFT-Chain only. NFT-Chain is the
**Aggregated NFT Layer** you’ve been dreaming of for years, since the first
NFT launch on Ethereum.

### NFT: More Than Art

Every NFT minted on NFT-Chain doesn’t just look stunning: it is a key to
unlock utility and multiple rewards.

  *  **NFT holders get the acclaimed $NFC token Airdrop.** A **fair Airdrop** where each NFT held gives a fixed amount of airdrop points. A once in a lifetime opportunity! Participating are all collections listed on **NFT-Chain.org** , and **“AiFrUiT”** and **“Vegetable Flowers”** on Polygon.
  *  **Limited Offer: Buy 2 NFTs, Get 3 NFTs.** And Get ✨ **EARLIER AIRDROP Premium Access** ✨. The more NFTs you buy, the more you are rewarded.
  *  **Multipliers for the $NFC Token Airdrop.** $NFC token holders who also hold NFTs will be rewarded with multipliers.
  *  **Blockchain Revenue Share for Life.** 💝 **Own Once, Forever Earn** a consistent share of the NFT-Chain’s success.
  *  **Lifelong Loyalty Benefits.** Boosted revenue share, future NFT drops, and more.
  *  **Get Early Access Perks.** Be first in line for new features, launches, and drops.
  *  **More utility-packed rewards to be revealed.**

Luxury Art, Breathtaking yet Accessible, and Family Friendly: they are now
your ticket to the future of the NFT economy.

### Why Now?

Because momentum is everything — and we’ve got it! Our NFT collections on
Polygon — AiFrUiT and Vegetable Flowers— are now booming. The Korea Chain
ecosystem is rapidly expanding. The **NFT-Chain Marketplace** is Live. And
this is your **chance to get in early**.

Buy today. Hold forever. Earn always!

🍓 Own the Future — with NFT-Chain.

![](https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1024/1*ujv4ccVWv0zIE_6TaE_5YQ.jpeg)The
Royale Society of Iceberg: featured in the NFT-Chain
Marketplace![](https://medium.com/_/stat?event=post.clientViewed&referrerSource=full_rss&postId=9373b07fed5a)

![](https://cdn-
images-1.medium.com/max/1024/1*IZyxqpVC5IpxxuvDaM96wQ.jpeg)Korea Chain artwork

In an era defined by rapid digital evolution, **Korea Chain emerges as a
beacon of innovation, resilience, and national uplifting**. More than a
blockchain platform, Korea Chain is a **global high-speed supercomputer
seamlessly integrated with advanced AI** , built to empower every citizen,
company, and institution. This is not just a technological project — it is a
**movement** , a **vision** , and an **opportunity** to position Korea as a
global leader in digital transformation.

👉 <https://korea-chain.com/>

### A Monumental Leap in Infrastructure and Innovation

Korea Chain’s current development stage reflects the unwavering dedication of
our team and partners. We are proud to announce the completion of several
groundbreaking milestones:

✅ **Architecture Complete** : Our “Infinitely Hyper-scalable Parallel-layered
Multi-blockchain Mesh” is fully designed, reviewed, and published.

✅ **Hardware Deployed** : We have deployed a scalable, secure, and carbon-
neutral Hyperconverged Hardware Infrastructure.

✅ **Protocol Ready** : Our cutting-edge, fault-tolerant protocol — developed
in Golang — is prepared to power the next generation of blockchains.

✅ **Successful NFT Launch** : Our nature-themed NFT collection, **“AiFrUiT”**
, has achieved notable sales, with an exciting airdrop on the horizon.

✅ **AI-Integrated Projects Underway** : We are preparing the launch of **“NFT-
Chain”** , a highly anticipated AI-driven platform.

✅ **Massive Airdrop Campaign** : With the launch of the Solana-based **Plushy
Lil Penguins** NFTs, participants are now eligible for **Asia’s largest
blockchain airdrop** , hosted by Korea Chain.

### A Mission with Impact: Korea at the Forefront

Korea Chain is **more than technology — it is a strategy for national and
global revitalization**. By integrating artificial intelligence into an open,
ultra-fast blockchain network, we are setting the stage for:

🌍 **Global Digital Community Expansion**  
💼 **Economic Vitality through Decentralized Innovation**  
🇰🇷 **Enhanced International Presence and Influence for Korea**

### AI + Blockchain: The Dual Engine of the Future

Our platform leverages next-generation AI capabilities to transform every
layer of the blockchain lifecycle:

🤖 **AI-Driven Operations** : Autonomous agents manage projects, decisions, and
execution.  
📊 **Automated Data Innovation** : Zero human error through full-cycle data
automation.  
🧠 **Real-Time Insight** : Strategic foresight, faster decisions, and unmatched
agility.  
🏭 **Industrial Disruption** : AI engineers' strategies that transform entire
industries.

### Built for Everyone. Built for Everywhere.

Korea Chain is a **public, high-speed, AI-blockchain platform** — designed not
just for tech giants, but for **every citizen, every business, every
institution**.

 **Use Cases:**

  *  **Finance** : Digital payments, programmable insurance, smart savings.
  *  **Private Sector** : Supply chain, manufacturing, logistics, cybersecurity.
  *  **Social Impact** : NGOs, education, community incentives, disaster support.
  *  **Other Fields** : Health, arts, cultural preservation, aid for migrants, freelancing.

Users fully control their identity, assets, and data via a **private Korean-
themed NFT** — **all within a secure and globally trusted ecosystem**.

### Technological Brilliance That Speaks for Itself

⚡ **Unparalleled Speed** : Finality within 200ms; 20,000 TPS capacity  
🌱 **Sustainability First** : Fully carbon-neutral, green infrastructure  
🛡️ **Military-Grade Security** : Multi-layer protection, end-to-end encryption  
🕵️ **Privacy Preserved** : Zero-compromise trust architecture  
🚀 **Effortless Scalability** : National-scale capacity with zero congestion

 **Efficiency Benchmark** : Achieves performance up to **10x greater than
Solana** and **100x greater than Ethereum** under real-world conditions.

### A Call to Corporate Partners, Innovators, and Visionaries

To our respected stakeholders, partners, and leaders: **Korea Chain is now
ready for handover to Korea’s corporate ecosystem**. It is mature, powerful,
and primed for acceleration. We invite **visionary institutions, enterprises,
and government bodies** to step in and lead this next chapter.

This is your opportunity to shape the future — not only of technology — but of
Korea’s digital sovereignty and global leadership.

Let us seize it. Together.

📩 [Contact Korea Chain](mailto:theodore@korea-chain.com)

####  **Korea Chain**

 **Built in Korea. Built for the World.**

![Plushy Lil Penguins](https://cdn-
images-1.medium.com/max/1024/1*hg7Gqvd7QlaG-n7HusKKVA.png) Plushy Lil
Penguins![](https://medium.com/_/stat?event=post.clientViewed&referrerSource=full_rss&postId=c7de0613c6e6)

> **Launching soon: Korea Chain Testnet** — the future of AI-powered sovereign
economies. Deploy micro-economies in minutes and unlock a **billion-dollar
opportunity** in secure, decentralized innovation.

![](https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1024/1*zroOpjStIRwPl-1fk9ImPw.jpeg)

We’re entering a new era in blockchain architecture — one defined not by
monolithic chains struggling to scale, but by **modular systems purpose-built
for performance, security, and interoperability**.

At the heart of this revolution are two production-ready chains: **Korea
Chain** and **NFT-Chain**. Both are built on the **“dream stack”** of Web3
infrastructure — **Dymension’s modular settlement layer** and **Celestia’s
ultra-scalable data availability layer**.

This combination delivers:

➡️ **Enshrined security** — Rollup logic embedded directly at the protocol
level for L1-grade protection.

➡️ **Blazing scalability** — Celestia’s DA layer provides unmatched throughput
for high-volume use cases.

➡️ **Seamless interoperability** — Native IBC and cross-rollup communication
connect you to the entire Cosmos and Ethereum ecosystems.

This isn’t just another EVM L2. This is a new paradigm — where **security,
performance, and interoperability converge** to create infrastructure capable
of supporting mass adoption.

With production-ready software based on **Go Ethereum v1.12.0, Cosmos SDK
v0.46.16** , **CometBFT v0.34.29** , **Evmos v12** , and **Ethermint v0.22.0**
, our chains are 100% Ethereum-compatible while natively connected to the
Cosmos ecosystem via IBC.

This is the **modular EVM blockchain future** , and we are ready to lead it.

### Why Korea Chain and NFT-Chain Are Different

Unlike traditional rollup solutions or monolithic chains, Korea Chain and NFT-
Chain leverage a **base-layer secured architecture**. This means:

✅ **Trustless finality** — No intermediaries. No compromise.

✅ **Native security model** — Protection baked in at the protocol level.

✅ **Network-guaranteed settlement** — Transactions settle with full L1
security.

Where competitors rely on smart contracts and multisigs (and the associated
attack vectors), Korea Chain and NFT-Chain inherit **direct security from the
settlement layer** , eliminating single points of failure.

### Korea Chain: The Backbone of Web3 in Asia

As the **first production-ready blockchain designed for the Korean market** ,
Korea Chain serves as the foundation for next-generation DeFi, gaming, and
enterprise dApps in the region.

🌐 **Full Ethereum compatibility** — Seamless migration for developers and
users.

⚡ **Ultra-low latency & high throughput** — Ideal for high-volume applications
like GameFi.

🔗 **IBC-enabled interoperability** — Connect effortlessly with Cosmos,
Celestia, and beyond.

🛡️ **Base-layer security** — No more reliance on smart contracts for rollup
settlement.

Korea Chain is **tailor-made for developers and enterprises** looking to
launch scalable applications with **sovereign control over their tokenomics**.

### NFT-Chain: Scaling Digital Collectibles Without Limits

NFT-Chain is a **dedicated application chain** purpose-built for NFTs and the
creator economy.

🎨 **Optimized for NFT minting and trading** — High-volume drops, zero
congestion.

🔄 **Shared liquidity pools** — Thanks to a native AMM embedded in the
settlement layer.

🤝 **Cross-chain NFT interoperability** — Trade and move assets across
ecosystems via IBC.

🚀 **Customizable execution environments** — EVM or CosmWasm support for
developers.

With NFT-Chain, we’re removing the bottlenecks that have plagued NFT platforms
and opening the door to **a truly global, multi-chain NFT marketplace**.

### Built on the Best Foundation: Dymension

Both chains are powered by **Dymension’s modular architecture** , which splits
the heavy lifting across dedicated layers:

🏛️ **Settlement Layer** — Robust security and fraud-proof validation.

📦 **RollApp Development Kit (RDK)** — Accelerated deployment of application-
specific rollups.

📡 **Inter-RollApp Communication (IRC)** — Fast, secure messaging across
chains.

By **enshrining RollApps at the protocol level** , Dymension ensures that our
chains benefit from **shared security, native liquidity, and seamless
interoperability**.

This means **Korea Chain and NFT-Chain are not just scalable — they’re future-
proof**.

### Why Now?

The Web3 ecosystem is rapidly shifting from monolithic blockchains to
**modular architectures**. Early movers like Korea Chain and NFT-Chain will
define the standards for performance, security, and developer experience in
this new paradigm.

With both products already **production-ready** , we are uniquely positioned
to:

📈 Capture the growing demand for scalable, secure blockchain infrastructure in
Asia and beyond.

🎯 Enable developers to launch applications faster with minimal overhead.

💎 Provide enterprises with a safe, interoperable environment for tokenized
assets.

### Join Us in Building the Internet of Blockchains

Korea Chain and NFT-Chain are not just MVPs. They’re the **blueprints for the
future of Web3 infrastructure**.

We are actively seeking strategic funding partners to accelerate adoption,
expand our developer ecosystem, and onboard enterprises ready to leverage the
**next generation of blockchain architecture**.

 **This is the moment. The Internet of Blockchains has arrived. Are you ready
to be part of it?**

![](https://medium.com/_/stat?event=post.clientViewed&referrerSource=full_rss&postId=de4ea6a07ffa)

### Introducing Korea Chain and NFT-Chain

 **Korea Chain** and **NFT-Chain** are more than just L2 rollups — they are
the next evolution of the internet itself — the **“Internet of Blockchains
Revolution”**. Deployed as **enshrined RollApps** on Dymension’s modular
stack, they harness the full power of AI, Web3, and personalized scalability
to deliver the most advanced blockchain experiences to date.

These are not experiments. They are the **main products**.

👉 <https://korea-chain.com/>

![](https://cdn-

### Korea Chain: The AI Global Economy Starts Here

>  _“A blockchain for every citizen of the world.”_

Korea Chain is the sovereign AI-native chain designed for **universal
adoption**. It brings together powerful innovations in governance,
infrastructure, and economics:

  *  **AI agent governance** : AI learns from global economic trends and user activity to generate proposals, govern operations, and optimize the network’s evolution.
  *  **Hyperconverged infrastructure** : Advanced security protocols, redundant power systems, optimized connectivity, all focused on global reach.
  *  **$KOREA token** : The native gas and governance token. Fast, sustainable, and built for global velocity.
  *  **Extra Income** : Each _“Plushy Lil Penguins”_ NFT on Solana will be airdropped an exclusive _“High-Investment NFT”_ , translating into an **extra income for life** from Korea Chain revenue share. Purchases can be made at <https://www.tensor.trade/trade/plushylilpenguins> ✨

Korea Chain is not just secure — it’s **accessible** , **blazing fast** ,
**global** , **highly rewarding** , and **engineered for freedom**.

### NFT-Chain: Art, Tokenization & Superintelligent AI

>  _“A Smarter Chain for the AI-Creative Era.”_

NFT-Chain specializes in family-friendly digital art, tokenized assets, and
next-gen collectibles. It powers:

  *  **Luxury meets accessibility** : High-end, breathtaking NFT art within reach for all.
  *  **AI-agent superintelligence** : End-to-end embedded AI agents learn from market trends, and strategize core decisions and operations.
  *  **$NFT token** : Used for gas, curation, and ecosystem incentives. Designed for long-term value and cultural significance.

NFT-Chain is the **RollApp of cultural capital** , secured by AI and powered
by creators.

### Infinitely Hyper-scalable Parallel-layered Multi-blockchain

By isolating execution into Parallel RollApps while unifying them with IRC,
the system becomes **limitlessly scalable** :

  *  **Thousands of chains** deployed in parallel
  * Each tuned for a specific domain (AI identity, luxury art, tokenized families, etc.)
  * Each optimized with its own performance parameters and block schedule
  *  **Latency remains ultra-low** — ~0.2s blocktimes
  *  **Throughput increases linearly** as more RollApps join the mesh

Where monolithic chains struggle to scale, the **IRC-connected RollApp
Fabric** grows stronger the more it expands.

### RollApp Technology with Real Performance

Built as **AI-Native Chains** on Dymension, Korea Chain and NFT-Chain enjoy
unprecedented performance and sovereignty:

  *  **0.2 second latency** , ~20,000 TPS
  * On-demand blocks with no consensus overhead
  * Interconnected economic zones using $KOREA and $NFT
  * Seamless scaling through embedded AI, without sacrificing decentralization

Each chain benefits from Dymension’s **enshrined rollup architecture** ,
providing:

  * Full sovereignty without validator overhead
  * Shared liquidity via Dymension’s AMM
  * Trust-minimized fraud proofs
  * Interoperability with other RollApps and IBC-enabled chains

The performance of global L2, with the agility of optimized Sequencers.

### AI-Agent Governance: A New Operating System for Blockchains

On both Korea Chain and NFT-Chain:

  * AI agents **monitor** , **classify** , and **predict** network behavior
  * Agents **generate governance proposals** , **set strategy** , and **create on-chain models** for token velocity, fee markets, and sustainability
  * From backend infrastructure to end-user flows, AI is **embedded** , **embodied** , and **essential**

This is not governance by vote — it’s governance by intelligence.

### Finance: Lifetime Value and Open Global Access

 **Lifetime Income Through High-Investment NFTs** — Korea Chain delivers a
groundbreaking financial product: _High-Investment NFTs_ that guarantee users
a share of network revenue — for life. These NFTs function as robust yield-
bearing digital assets directly connected to blockchain activity. As Korea
Chain expands, your income potential grows with it. This innovative model
transforms participants into vested stakeholders in the network’s success,
creating perfect alignment across the entire ecosystem.

  * To participate, users will purchase _“Plushy Lil Penguins”_ NFT on Solana, and be airdropped 1 _High-Investment NFT_ for each 1 _“Plushy Lil Penguins”_ NFT bought.
  * Purchases can be made at <https://www.tensor.trade/trade/plushylilpenguins> ✨

 **Borderless, Frictionless, Efficient Cross-border Open Finance at Scale** —
it is easier and faster to transact between countries than through a local
bank account. A fluid financial experience that’s equally optimized for
emerging cross-border markets and high-frequency trading environments.

### The Tokens: $KOREA and $NFT

Forget side currencies. Our **native gas tokens** are the **product**.

  *  **$KOREA** fuels speedy transactions on Korea Chain: identity, asset movement, AI governance votes.
  *  **$NFT** powers NFT-Chain’s cultural markets, creator incentives, and tokenized experiences.

Unlike generic gas tokens, these tokens are **AI-tuned** for supply and
demand, designed for **value accrual** within a hyper-specific, high-
performance domain.

### The New Layer 2 is the RollApp

AI-Native Chains like Korea Chain and NFT-Chain prove that **RollApps are no
longer infrastructure experiments — they are sovereign, scalable Layer 2s**.

They control:

  * Their own native gas and economic policy
  * Governance models
  * Transaction logic
  * Data publication strategies
  * Sequencer selection

All while delivering **L2-grade performance** , AI governance, and global
interoperability.

### Conclusion: Your RollApp, Your Economy

Welcome to the **new economic stack** , built not just for performance — but
for purpose.

With **Korea Chain** and **NFT-Chain** , the blockchain is no longer just
infrastructure. It is **identity** , **culture** , **governance** , and
**intelligence** — fully owned, fully sovereign, and powered by the world’s
most scalable RollApp framework.

Join us. **$KOREA** and **$NFT** are soon going live.

👉 <https://korea-chain.com/>
